Category: — INSTRUMENT TOTALS (gross, before dedup) —
Colima state carbon tax (S)
Note: Stationary combustion; taxed fuels only (NG exempt)

Category: Mexico federal carbon tax (F)
Note: All fuels incl. transport; upstream levy; NG exempt

Category: Mexico Pilot ETS (E)
Note: Large emitters ≥25,000 tCO₂e/yr; non-binding pilot; legal scope only

Category: — VENN DECOMPOSITION (7 segments) —
S ∩ F ∩ E  [all three]
Note: Electricity diesel+FO, cement combustion, metallurgical

Category: S ∩ F only  [state + federal, not ETS]
Note: Manuf (food, non-metallic, other), residential, commercial, agri

Category: S only  [state tax only — not federal, not ETS]
Note: Biogas/energy generation plants; non-fossil fuel — exempt from IEPS federal tax

Category: F only  [federal only — not state, not ETS]
Note: Road, water, rail, aviation transport fuels

Category: E only  [ETS only — not taxed by either carbon tax]
Note: NG fraction at Manzanillo thermoelectric; exempt from both taxes

Category: S ∩ E only  [state + ETS, not federal]
Note: Empty — all ETS sources in state scope are also in federal scope

Category: F ∩ E only  [federal + ETS, not state]
Note: Empty — federal tax does not cover NG; NG is E-only

Category: — KEY DERIVED METRICS —
Net S-only: Colima state tax NOT covered by F or E
Note: Biogas only; <0.1% of state. State tax adds near-zero unique coverage vs federal tax

Category: Cumulative deduplicated union  S ∪ F ∪ E
Note: All emissions covered by at least one of the three instruments

Category: Total Colima state emissions (context)
Note: IMADES 2015 base extrapolated at blended sector CAGR
